/home/nightly/congaree-gx/2015-10-26.193953/build/install/tile/usr/lib/bme/usr/include/tmc/mem.h File Reference

Support for moving blocks of memory in and out of a Tile's cache. More...


Functions

static __USUALLY_INLINE void tmc_mem_fence (void)
 Fence to guarantee visibility of stores to cache coherent memory.
void tmc_mem_flush_no_fence (const void *addr, size_t size)
 Flush a region of memory, but do not fence.
void tmc_mem_finv_no_fence (const void *addr, size_t size)
 Flush and invalidate a region of memory, but do not fence.
static __inline void tmc_mem_fence_incoherent (void)
 Fence to guarantee visibility of stores to incoherent memory.
static __inline void tmc_mem_flush (const void *addr, size_t size)
 Flush a region of memory.
static __inline void tmc_mem_finv (const void *addr, size_t size)
 Flush and invalidate a region of memory.
void tmc_mem_inv_no_fence (void *addr, size_t size)
 Invalidate a region of memory, but do not fence.
static __inline void tmc_mem_inv (void *addr, size_t size)
 Invalidate a region of memory.
void tmc_mem_write_hint (void *addr, size_t size)
 Write-hint a region of memory.
void tmc_mem_prefetch (const void *addr, size_t size)
 Prefetch a region of memory.
void tmc_mem_invalidate_icache (const void *addr, size_t size)
 Invalidate a block of memory in the instruction cache.
void tmc_mem_flush_l2 (void)
 Flush the contents of this core's L2 cache back to main memory.

Detailed Description

Support for moving blocks of memory in and out of a Tile's cache.
